# Appendix {#sec-appendix}

## A.1 Source Code Repositories

The complete source code is available at the following GitHub repositories under the MIT License:

| Repository | Description | URL |
|-----------|-------------|-----|
| UpHeal-Doc | Thesis documentation and Quarto project | <https://github.com/Upheal1/UpHeal-Doc> |
| UpHeal-Backend | Python FastAPI backend and AI pipeline | <https://github.com/Upheal1/UpHeal-Backend> |
| UpHeal-Frontend | Flutter mobile application | <https://github.com/Upheal1/UpHeal-Frontend> |

## A.2 Publications

No publications have resulted from this project at the time of submission.
